subject: Re: Sunset Sound Journey - Summer 2026
body:
Hi,

Following up on my email from last week about sunset sound journeys for Scorpios.

I understand you're likely deep in 2026 planning. Just wanted to make sure my proposal didn't get lost.

Quick recap:

  • RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
  • 4 years sunset ceremonies at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore)
  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Aspen, CO)

Here's the 3-min range video: Watch Demo

Happy to jump on a quick call whenever convenient.

Best,
Alessio / FLUTUR

subject: Re: Sound Journey Artist - Guest Experience 2026
body:
Buongiorno,

Mi permetto un gentile follow-up sulla mia proposta per esperienze sonore presso Borgo Egnazia.

Come artista RAV Vast endorsed con 4 anni di residenza in hotel di lusso (Villa Porta, Lago Maggiore), credo di poter aggiungere valore alle vostre sunset experiences.

Video demo (3 min): Guarda qui

Resto a disposizione per una breve call conoscitiva.

Cordiali saluti,
Alessio / FLUTUR

subject: Re: Sunset Live Act - Estate 2026
body:
Ciao,

Torno sulla mia proposta per sunset sessions live a Phi Beach.

Visto il vostro format (aperitivo → sunset → dj set), il mio live act potrebbe funzionare come bridge perfetto tra i due momenti.

Il mio sound:

  • RAV Vast + live looping + vocoder
  • Da meditativo a groovy (stile Ben Böhmer/Monolink vibe)
  • Già testato al Drishti Beats Festival (main stage, Aspen CO)

Demo range completo: Video 3 min

Fammi sapere se ha senso parlarne!

Alessio / FLUTUR

subject: Re: Live Sunset Sessions - Mykonos 2026
body:
Hi,

Quick follow-up on my proposal for sunset live sessions at Principote.

I know Mykonos venues get flooded with requests. What makes me different:

  • Not a DJ - live one-man orchestra (RAV Vast + looping + voice)
  • Tested at luxury venues (4-year residency at Italian villa resort)
  • Scalable: intimate ceremony → full energy set

3-min demo showing full range: Watch here

Would love to discuss if there's a fit.

Best,
Alessio / FLUTUR

subject: Re: RAV Vast Live - WooMooN 2026
body:
Hi WooMooN team,

Following up on my proposal for the 2026 season.

I've been following WooMooN for years - the ceremonial-meets-dance energy is exactly where my sound lives.

What I bring:

  • RAV Vast sound journey → builds into melodic electronic (live looping)
  • Perfect for opening sets or cooldown moments
  • Drishti Beats Festival 2023 main stage experience

Full range demo: Watch 3-min video

Let me know if you'd like to chat about possibilities.

Namaste,
Alessio / FLUTUR
